summary: AS608-style fingerprint module over TTL UART, intended to use imported vendor .h/.c driver files.
notes: Import the verified vendor .h/.c implementation before scaffolding so the generated project uses the real driver source.
This pack models the common UART wiring: VCC, GND, TX, RX, with optional BL and RST control pins exposed on some boards.
Baud rate and command set vary across AS608-family breakout vendors, so use the official module manual and sample code from your exact supplier.
sources: Waveshare UART Fingerprint Reader User Manual, section 2.2 and 3.2
Adafruit Optical Fingerprint Sensor Library examples
